heading: Labor Statistics, Bureau of: bulletins
label: 1324 Labor Statistics, Bureau of: bulletins
text: There shall be printed one edition of fifteen thousand copies of each issue of the bulletin of the Bureau of Labor Statistics authorized by , and extra copies not to exceed twenty thousand of any single issue, when in the opinion of the Commissioner of Labor Statistics the demand for the bulletin makes an extra edition necessary.section 5 of Title 29
